entries.gt_9d4c653d0be677: [FACTION] No suitable event in the current zone.
entries.gt_70782df1d9f5ce: hold: do not follow the sign
entries.gt_cc8f739af0bb62: The procession psalm caught the player's step.
entries.gt_cab788d8eccb44: The psalm caught your step. ${riskText}; a meat rune sticks to your palm. Hold ${controlHint('interact')} to resist.
entries.gt_65e36b8731e1bc: The psalm caught your step. ${riskText}; hold ${controlHint('interact')} to resist.
entries.gt_07627fc5bb9771: The player resists the procession and breaks the imposed step.
entries.gt_ed9f1e57b49f44: You brace against the concrete. The psalm pulls weaker while the key is held.
entries.gt_3ba7bd904929af: The player radioed the procession route to the liquidators.
entries.gt_34d0f510e3d32a: The radio hisses: liquidators accepted the procession route.
entries.gt_3c86966c244757: The procession route has already been sent to the liquidators.
entries.gt_11784a8f60387d: The player waited out the procession at the corridor edge.
entries.gt_a919925a8e7e02: You waited out the procession by the wall. The psalm passes by.
entries.gt_d38906e86e1e21: You are already keeping out of the procession's path.
entries.gt_20466020e191bb: The player holds the meat rune as an anchor and keeps the procession from taking the step.
entries.gt_1a1b963a820ee8: The meat rune warms and holds you in place. The procession passes by.
entries.gt_05c017b4709cb4: The rune is already holding your step outside the procession.
entries.gt_595793ce8420d2: The player resists the procession at the line itself.
entries.gt_41003ea8ffcd2a: You broke the imposed step. Hold the key, or the psalm will pull again.
entries.gt_49e8c4a9d4efed: You are already resisting the procession.
entries.gt_20c5ac4ed1c9bb: Event trace examined: local pressure eased a little.
entries.gt_b7ad0782fe6f48: this clash already left a trace in the zone
entries.gt_a5ece0730af8fd: no place found for both clash sides
entries.gt_83493ec6598105: no place found for a visible clash
entries.gt_0f12aae9aec332: You intervened on the liquidators' side.
entries.gt_71cb82e5c68fa9: You struck the liquidators, and the cult noticed.
entries.gt_ecccdc064659ba: You lifted loot from the floor while both sides were busy with each other.
entries.gt_e30a6ff08ed6ae: You left the clash behind while the corridor was still shooting.
entries.gt_ad17e9c5ef204d: The clash got a new witness.
entries.gt_6e6aa783f72b04: no place found for a visible event
entries.gt_7a6b7ad1fd219c: Procession disrupted: some pilgrims did not reach the mark.
entries.gt_18fb2440d1a4ab: The procession lost its step. The cult will remember this, and so will the liquidators.
entries.gt_812a1cb744e156: Procession nearby. Your step will pull on its own; hold ${controlHint('interact')} to resist, or report by radio.
entries.gt_b6a2dac20a8841: The psalm presses on PSI. Keep resisting or leave the line.
entries.gt_9e29535e0b1e68: The psalm cuts your hearing bloody. Hold your step against the movement.
entries.gt_ee85448dda466d: ${room}${zone}: theft is remembered here. Lead: other people's containers now lead to an audit.
entries.gt_dac14aeea0e588: ${room}${zone}: after the fight, residents listen for footsteps. Lead: talk and prices have grown harsher.
entries.gt_d92ff20c98497e: avoid this zone for now or check the aftermath after all-clear
entries.gt_ec172cf5fe0ae0: find shelter and do not enter fog without ammo
entries.gt_ff89c3d9910809: check the receded fog for loot and traces
entries.gt_ffdb1b8d7e2bb2: bring raw material or look for a scarce resource near the shop
entries.gt_96d1a564f61d93: keep away from the container owner or prepare an explanation
entries.gt_cb8e165bb4fe06: open the quest log and prepare a sortie
entries.gt_deec523e72cd17: check the clash zone for control, loot, and witnesses
entries.gt_c933783ab122e3: check the battle site for a rare drop
entries.gt_a5c3608b846abd: check the rumor site before witnesses scatter and tracks are trampled
entries.gt_f1d8cf3e0d2d71: witness dragged from the white window
entries.gt_c847b99477e892: overexposed frame carried out of the white passage
entries.gt_aaca37c8c90d55: An extra person got inside, but water, air, and the place by the door became a common debt.
entries.gt_2cd717caf40d6f: debt for water and crowding to those who saw the second line
entries.gt_decc71546259c1: The door held the room, but the empty line on the roster gained a voice and witnesses.
entries.gt_1f0cfe3b80fd1a: debt of silence to those who heard knocking outside
entries.gt_f5072709602178: The Ministry received the names of the sheltered; section elders have already written down who carried the list upstairs.
entries.gt_d0e939811d57f9: debt to neighbors became a departmental round
entries.gt_1b17ea9113dcce: The fake roster went upstairs, but the seal is too even, and the section elder knows another hand.
entries.gt_2e747253894961: forgery debt: the extra line bought passage, but not a living witness
entries.gt_d31852df993b24: the one replaced by a line
entries.gt_cb5f7878f6ed59: Section elders read the list by the radiator: who was entered, who was forgotten, and who now gets a candle.
entries.gt_cd6c2cb206ce75: debt to residents is read aloud by the radiator
entries.gt_8ab04209327235: Residents received the list with extra living names; the house committee asks who held the pen.
entries.gt_476a81c7b49760: forgery debt returned to the entrance with another hand
entries.gt_c1de175e70ba09: extra living names in the list
entries.gt_2ba9a4186c9ffc: Another surname was added to the list; the section elder will notice not the seal, but the neighbor who is silent at roll call.
entries.gt_278d91dd4809db: ink debt: entered one, explain the second
entries.gt_0bf033b1325cc5: The cult received the witnesses' names; now those people will be sought by the hermodoor after the next bell.
entries.gt_e724320591f187: debt to witnesses sold to those who knock after all-clear
entries.gt_3ebb42f4c94780: Liquidators bought the list as grounds for rounds and interrogations.
entries.gt_7a41eee9077039: debt became a round route with two witnesses
entries.gt_d2dd16cc7488a3: The roster is hidden; now the house committee counts empty lines and those who avert their eyes.
entries.gt_43fb7a988cc993: debt hidden with the list, but empty lines stayed by the door
entries.gt_10cb7fa8680244: The shelter list was stolen before revision; the elder recorded the loss, the witnesses, and those who stopped answering.
entries.gt_981da77aebdfae: theft debt: the list vanished, but the witnesses remained
